Actions.Text: ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.467

Title: Relates to the ability of the New York state medical care facilities finance agency to issue certain bonds and notes
Summary: Increases the authorization of the Dormitory Authority of the State of New York ("DASNY"), as successor to the New York State Medical Care Facilities Finance Agency ("MCFFA") pursuant to the Health Care Financing Consolidation Act of 1995, to issue hospital and nursing home project bonds and notes from $20 billion to $21.8 billion.
LawSection: New York State Medical Care Facilities Finance Agency Act
LawCode: Amd §7, NYS Med Care Fac Fin Ag Act
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the New York state medical care facilities finance agency act, in relation to the ability to issue certain bonds and notes
